name: geekslides
description: Geekslides is oriented towards creating effective remote presentations, specially for empowering learning experiences.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @geekslides/engine && npm run build -w @geekslides/server && npm run build -w @geekslides/cli
scripts.v1:install: npm i --prefix broker && npm i --prefix demo && npm i --prefix slides
scripts.v1:start: demo/node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js --kill-others "npm --prefix broker run start" "npm --prefix slides run start"
